title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Researchers at the University of Cambridge are using AI tools including AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to analyze bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. The approach compresses analysis that previously took years into minutes, accelerating drug discovery against antimicrobial-resistant bacteria.
